title: Drone Archetypes Schema
description: Schema for defining various drone archetypes and their default components.

archetype_id.description: Unique identifier for the drone archetype.

description.description: A brief description of the drone archetype.

components.description: Map of component names to their configuration objects.

^[A-Za-z]+Component$.description: Configuration for a specific component. Specific properties depend on the component type.
